Metadata.title: Aldo Arbizu | B2B Mobile & SaaS Architect
Metadata.description: Senior React Native Developer and Product Engineer.

engineer.badgeText: 正在寻找 B2B / SaaS 挑战
engineer.c1Desc: 为物流和安全系统构建弹性 SQLite 数据库。
engineer.c2Desc: 处理离线队列并在网络恢复时解析状态。
engineer.c3Desc: 从 React Native UI 一直到 PostgreSQL 和 n8n。

agtech.status: 现场协议 // 农业科技
agtech.c1Desc: 使用 React Three Fiber 显示高质量的 3D 数据。
agtech.c2Desc: 为农村地区的低端移动设备进行优化。
agtech.c3Desc: 在操作现场提供触觉和听觉响应。

security.status: 安全许可 // 赛博安全
security.c1Desc: 实施 SQLCipher 保护本地静态数据。
security.c2Desc: 每个操作都经过加密记录用于合规性。
security.c3Desc: 防止 GPS 和设备数据的操作。

engineer.title: Armored code designed to survive in real production.
engineer.body: I won't lie to you with corporate jargon: my code is designed to survive in the mud of real-world production. My technical background started in physical and cyber security. I know the fragility of the real world. That's why I obsessed over Offline-First development (SQLite WAL + Zustand) and hardening applications so they don't crash when a worker loses signal in the middle of nowhere.
engineer.p1Desc: Bidirectional incremental sync and immutable local transaction queues to prevent database conflicts.
engineer.p2Desc: Local SQLCipher encryption, cryptographic telemetry signatures, and static code scans pre-compilation.
engineer.p3Desc: B2B software generates my income, but my purpose goes further. I actively allocate a percentage of my profits and compute power to open-impact projects to give real value back to society.

agtech.title: The invisible union between the mathematics of code and aesthetic sobriety.
agtech.body: Software is not about stacking noisy dependencies; it is a discipline of artisanal design. I believe in clean interfaces, procedural haptic audio, and custom-modeled fluid 3D meshes. To design is to simplify: removing visual excess to reveal the technical elegance of the product. Every line of code meets the highest aesthetic and functional standards, delivering a product we are proud of.
agtech.p1Desc: Clean, modular, and self-documented code that reads with the clarity and precision of a classic text.
agtech.p2Desc: Custom modeling in Blender and WebGL optimization to achieve fluid interactive interfaces that load instantly.
agtech.p3Desc: Each digital product is signed as a unique work of engineering, visual balance, and sensory response.

security.title: I build software designed to withstand real-world failures.
security.body: I come from the private security and cybersecurity world. In that sector, if a system fails in a basement or a remote field, the impact is not a minor bug: it's a real vulnerability and a financial loss. That's why I obsessed over Offline-First development and SQLite WAL. I don't build fragile desktop prototypes; I create resilient software that ensures your sales keep processing, your employees keep reporting, and your business keeps capturing value, regardless of network conditions.
security.p1Desc: If your app crashes when cell signal drops, you lose money. We design with atomic local storage to ensure every interaction counts.
security.p2Desc: We protect your information assets. We implement local encryption and perform automatic security audits (MARTA QA) before every deployment.
security.p3Desc: Code is the means, not the end. We design scalable SaaS platforms ready to capture leads, process payments, and generate real value 24/7.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps (Offline-First)
mobile.desc: Starting at $4,500 USD. Design and development of React Native apps that work offline. Ideal for logistics, agtech or security.

saas.title: SaaS & Fullstack Architecture
saas.desc: Starting at $6,000 USD. B2B web development with Next.js and PostgreSQL. Robust Stripe/UCP payment integration.

n8n.desc: Starting at $1,200 USD. Business automation with n8n to capture leads and automate repetitive tasks 24/7.

StudioLab.desc: I combine the power of Pixal3D generative AI with traditional Blender modeling. I reconstruct photorealistic assets in seconds and then polygonally optimize them to create interactive, fluid, and ultra-lightweight WebGL experiences.
StudioLab.emulatorHint: TAP PHONE TO BOOT · DRAG TO ROTATE

mobile.title: Mobile Prototyping
mobile.desc: Three-dimensional modeling of rugged phones and screens to validate the ergonomics of large touch buttons (56px) ideal for industrial use with gloves.

textures.title: Material Textures
textures.desc: Realistic, reflective physical materials in Blender to simulate the texture of premium touch interfaces and high-end mobile hardware.

lighting.title: Environment Composition
lighting.desc: Detailed study of lighting and dynamic HDRI shadows that project a sense of cinematic depth before writing a single line of frontend code.

reconstruction.title: Pixal3D Reconstruction
reconstruction.desc: Automated generation of high-density 3D meshes with Pixal3D, followed by controlled retopology in Blender and Draco compression for instant web integrations.

StudioLab.pipelineDesc: "The synergy between neural generation with Pixal3D and optimization in Blender redefines development times. Complex assets that previously took days are now reconstructed and polished in minutes."

TitanFlow.titleLine1: I don't just invest in the market —

bots.desc: I develop systems that read the market to free me from manual charting, giving me free time to build more software.

NexusTelemetry.desc: My personal node monitors global infrastructure, markets, and server states in real-time. This is the telemetry engine powering my architectures.

engineer.problem: Friction due to slippage and latency in futures APIs.
engineer.solution: Low-latency concurrent WebSockets with Kelly oracle for slippage control.

security.problem: High copy-trading fees and API keys custody risk.
security.solution: Smart contracts on Base L2 (ERC-4626) with non-custodial local order signing.

agtech.problem: Noisy trading consoles that induce overtrading and visual fatigue.
agtech.solution: Minimalist dark dashboard with clean charts and purged telemetry.

engineer.problem: Real-time processing of cognitive biases in investor dialogues.
engineer.solution: Local bias detector with WASM coupled with streaming Vercel AI SDK.

security.problem: High costs of traditional wealth advisory.
security.solution: Premium AI advisor integrated into ROI simulations with $0.20 USD micropayments.

agtech.problem: Cold banking interfaces lacking discretion and visual prestige.
agtech.solution: Wealth management dashboard with dark glassmorphism and brushed gold accents.

engineer.problem: Loss of sales transactions due to abrupt connectivity drops.
engineer.solution: Atomic local queuing in SQLite WAL with automatic differential triggers.

security.problem: Customer churn at physical counters due to unstable internet.
security.solution: Offline-First POS with dual QR charging signatures and Google Pay checkout.

agtech.problem: Slow catalog interfaces that interrupt customer flow.
agtech.solution: Premium interactive catalog with Bento Grid transitions and refined typography.

engineer.problem: Fraud through cloning of NFC tags for patrol rounds.
engineer.solution: Biometric validation with local TensorFlow Lite network auditing control photos.

security.problem: High costs of patrol batons and signal loss in subways.
security.solution: Mobile app with Aegis SOS dispatch and local P2P Mesh communication.

agtech.problem: Overloaded tactical screens that fatigue the night operator.
agtech.solution: Ultra-high contrast with monospaced typography and night-optimized interfaces.

engineer.problem: Abrupt flight telemetry transitions in mobile rendering.
engineer.solution: Fluid state control with Animated.spring and hardware signal damping.

security.problem: Loss of parcel maps due to zero signal in remote fields.
security.solution: Offline-First image processing and parcel telemetry with background sync.

agtech.problem: Clunky cartographic visualizations in delivery reports.
agtech.solution: Cartographic layers with smooth glassmorphic transitions and precise haptic interface.

engineer.problem: Imprecise local 3D volumetric calculation on the mobile client.

security.problem: Slow silobag and livestock appraisals and complex auction processes.
security.solution: AR simulator for offline calculation and livestock auctions with real-time WebRTC.

agtech.problem: Clunky agrarian interfaces that discourage daily adoption.
agtech.solution: Premium dashboard with Bento Grid, dark textures, and amber light contrasts.

agtech.problem: Informal cannabis sites that do not convey rigor.

engineer.problem: Vulnerable RLS security policies during complex audit queries.
engineer.solution: Strict RLS schema and on-chain cryptographic signatures on Base L2.

security.problem: High costs of certification and forestry audits for municipalities.
security.solution: Sentinel-2 satellite biomass estimation and Soulbound Tokens (SBT) issuance.

agtech.problem: Cold carbon interfaces that look like Excel spreadsheets.
agtech.solution: Interactive 3D model of the municipal forest that grows with donations.

engineer.problem: Geolocation of lost pets without expensive cellular subscriptions.

security.solution: Downloadable QR plates in STL for zero-cost 3D printing and SBT donations.

agtech.problem: Generic identifiers or playful interfaces lacking seriousness.
